output: Repository-owned quick_validate.py passed docs-maintainer and all three PRD skills from a clean clone without a global skill installation.
check:skills passed 167 files and 16 mirrors; check:docs passed 206 files; four tooling files and 42 tests passed.
The relative Claude mirror, UI metadata, PRD phases, ordinary route, semantic fixtures, and bounded report paths were all present.
limitations: Structural portability and held-out scenarios do not prove every future worker decision.
nonClaims: No external provider, workflow, deployment, credential, release, publication, or production state was accessed or established.
